TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cavak, title = Cavak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cavak} }

S.FORM: alang Cavak ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 273 buwan, 864 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 794 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 70 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, Rukay 2%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cavak hya' ga bay'nux. tay 'zil na Cavak hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cavak hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkraya' na Cavak hya' ga Kaohsiung. tay mkraya' na Cavak hya' ga Talamakau. tay mkyahu' na Cavak hya' ga Djineljepan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cavak ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 273 buwan, 864 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 794 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 70 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, Rukay 2%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cavak hya' ga bay'nux. tay 'zil na Cavak hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cavak hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay mkraya' na Cavak hya' ga Kaohsiung. tay mkraya' na Cavak hya' ga Talamakau. tay mkyahu' na Cavak hya' ga Djineljepan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨa*ak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu s~ɕantimon ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨa*ak ħjaʔ ɣa βajʔnux. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨa*ak ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨa*ak ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨa*ak ħjaʔ ɣa kaoħs~ɕiuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨa*ak ħjaʔ ɣa talamakau. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨa*ak ħjaʔ ɣa *jineljepan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
